metadata.title: Offchain Labs challenges Vitalik's RISC-V proposal, says WASM better for Ethereum L1
metadata.description: The researchers argue WASM, which has been battle-tested across billions of execution environments, is a better long-term bet than RISC-V.
metadata.keywords: Crypto Ecosystems, Layer 1s, Layer 2s and Scaling, Arbitrum, Ethereum, offchain-labs, risc-v
